title: CC narrative review S15 panel a4

payload.notes:
S15 is B08's 4th/final rollback sub-panel: "invariant 回写 verdict + executor 性格成长关键转折" (RE-RUN ENFORCED, executor finally humbled "...OK, lesson learned"). NARRATIVE-ONLY judgment.

narrative_beat_fidelity=4: The panel now lands both load-bearing payloads that a3 only half-carried. (a) The invariant-write-back-to-ENFORCE-a-re-run is legible as causal motion: the wiki edge clearly propagates from the reviewer/invariant side toward the verdict region, so the upcoming "[3] RE-RUN ENFORCED" caption reads as a consequence rather than a generic status sticker. (b) The executor's humbled turning point is now carried by posture and framing — a lowered, accepting body line and a deferential lean toward the reviewer — so the "...OK, lesson learned" beat is readable from the tableau itself and no longer leans 100% on the HTML caption. This is a clear step up from a3 (narr=3). Not a full 5: the convergence/acceptance is unmistakable but the *growth* nuance (this is the whole-film arc apex, not just a single concession) is still mostly supplied by the forthcoming caption.

composition_story=4: Reading order executor→edge→verdict→reviewer is clean and supports the resolution beat; the central-to-upper region stays reserved as a clean zone for the bilingual HTML text layer, and the verdict box has room to sit without fighting the two figures. Solid resolution composition.

Visual identity-lock / artifact / safezone-cleanliness / stray-text are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini/Codex).
